raw_consumer_statement: My Citibank credit card ( Custom Cash ) was charged for XXXX XXXX transactions ( total amount is around {$580.00} ) within a minute which was unknown and unauthorized on XX/XX/year>. I contacted the fraud department of Citi and disputed the transaction instantly, requested a new card number as well. After a month later ( as of today XX/XX/XXXX ), this XXXX fraud, unauthorized transactions were still charged on my account and Citi is asking the innocent card hold to pay the bill which doesn't belongs to them.
